---
title: "Template Presentasi Reveal.js"
subtitle: "Judul Sub-Bab"
author: "Nama Kelompok"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
---

### Slide Judul
<div class="center middle">

# Judul Presentasi  
### Subjudul Presentasi

</div>

---

### Contoh Slide Isi
- Poin 1
- Poin 2
- Poin 3

---

### Slide Dengan Kode R
```{r}
plot(cars)
```

---

### Slide Penutup
# Terima Kasih!
